history.content:
<thought>
The agent is facing north. The cell directly ahead is lava (L), which is deadly. The goal (O) is located to the north-east. Turning clockwise will make the agent face east, and the cell to the east is a floor (.), which is safe and moves towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is located two rows above and two columns to the left of my current position. The cell directly in front (north) is a safe floor cell, while left and right are lava or wall. Moving forward is a safe step towards the goal. I will move forward first.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north (up). The cell directly ahead is a floor (.), but moving up would lead to a wall above that cell, and the goal O is to the left and up. To reach the goal, I need to go left first to the floor cells at my current row. So I should turn counter-clockwise to face west (left) and then move forward.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is located two cells ahead and one cell to the right of my current position. The cell directly in front of me is a floor cell, so it is safe to move forward. I will move forward to approach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at the bottom center, facing upward. The cell directly ahead is a floor cell (.), which is safe. The goal O is located one step forward and one step to the right. I will move forward first to reach the empty cell, then later turn to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The goal cell 'O' is immediately to my right (east). I am currently facing north, and the cell directly in front of me is a wall '#'. To reach the goal, I need to turn clockwise to face east, then move forward. I will first turn.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal 'O' is directly in front of me (one cell ahead). I can move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
